summary: Middling show overall, but the post‑drums portion shines; recording quality not described.
review: The reviewer rates this concert as average (3 ★), noting that the performance before the drum solo was underwhelming. However, everything after the drums is praised, suggesting a strong second half. No details are given about the source or clarity of the audio.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rated review; comments indicate an average show with a highlighted post‑drum segment, but no information on recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Early part of the concert is considered weak, but the material after the drum solo is described as rocking.
